headline: Warner Bros. Discovery Gains on Report EU Regulators Will Approve Paramount Deal (WBD)
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery (NASDAQ:WBD) shares moved higher on Wednesday after a report indicated that European Union regulators are preparing to approve Paramount’s proposed acquisition of the media and entertainment company.
